parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ source: 'n8n-uc13-reservation-created-automation', reservationId: $('Validate HMAC or Token').item.json.event.reservationId, roomId: $('Get Reservation Automation Context').item.json.room?.id ?? $('Get Reservation Automation Context').item.json.reservation?.roomId, facilityId: $('Get Reservation Automation Context').item.json.facility?.id ?? $('Get Reservation Automation Context').item.json.reservation?.facilityId, taskType: 'PRE_CHECKIN_ROOM', assignedTeamCode: 'HOUSEKEEPING', dueBeforeHours: 2, dueAt: $('Get Reservation Automation Context').item.json.preCheckInCleaningDueAt, note: 'Tu dong tao task don dep 2 gio truoc check-in' }) }}

conditions.leftValue: ={{ Boolean($('Get Reservation Automation Context').item.json.directCheckIn?.enabled ?? $('Get Reservation Automation Context').item.json.reservation?.directCheckInEnabled ?? false) }}
